name: anafpy
description: Plugins for anafpy — typed Python clients and a local MCP server for Romania's ANAF tax-authority web services.

plugins.name: anafpy-setup
plugins.description: Install and configure anafpy on this computer, then connect it to Claude. Probes what is already in place, installs what is missing, and repairs a broken setup.

plugins.name: anafpy-workflows
plugins.description: ANAF workflow skills for Cowork: file e-Transport declarations, author/sign tax declarations, and summarize personal income. Drives the anafpy MCP tools (configure the connector via the anafpy-setup plugin).
